title: Quark Recipes Regions Unexplored
description: Resolves the recipe conflict between Regions Unexplored and Quark's chest and bookcase recipes
body:
![Logo](https://i.ibb.co/QvhWDP5k/logo-wide.png)

# Features:

Resolves the recipe conflict between Regions Unexplored and Quark's chest and bookcase recipes

# Requirements

- [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)

# Donation

[https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond](https://ko-fi.com/lordddiamond)

# Modpacks

Yeah, you **can** use it in your modpack! 😇

![Missing Chest Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/mrpSWYfd/Screen-1-Resized.jpg)
![Missing Bookshelf Recipe](https://i.ibb.co/mpzhFwD/Screen-2-Resized.jpg)
